acceptance_criteria: Read-only status command exists and returns JSON.
State contains every four-slice step, blockers, allowed next actions and evidence pointers.
Focused tests cover main clean, dirty feature, clean feature PR, handoff branch and bounded text rendering.
loop_risks: post-merge-complete may NOOP while validation_report generated_head is stale; patch-cycle-status surfaces HANDOFF_REFRESH_SLICE when main is clean but handoff is stale.
PR number/SHA transfer is unreliable if it only lives in chat; optional --pr enriches state when available but status remains useful without it.
Generated handoff projection changes must continue through admin-refresh-pr or generator-backed paths, not manual edits.

new_minimal_renderer.gui_use: A GUI can poll this command and show one primary next action plus per-step status.
new_minimal_renderer.purpose: Render current four-slice patch/handoff state from existing git, PR and handoff carriers without creating a parallel workflow engine.

open_questions: Should a later patch-cycle-continue command call existing wrappers automatically or only recommend next commands?
Should patch-cycle status persist a run_id for GUI continuity, or stay entirely derived/read-only?
Should PR enrichment become mandatory for GUI mode after a PR number is known?
redundancy_assessment: Existing wrappers already perform mutations; patch-cycle-status must stay read-only.
pr-create-complete and admin-refresh-pr remain the mutation authorities for PR and handoff refresh work.
No new persistent state file is introduced in this slice; validation_report.json and git status are reused.

transitions.guard: worktree clean, protected-diff-plan PASS, explicit commit/push complete
patch PR merged, main synced, post-merge-complete/check detects or confirms handoff need
admin refresh generated through wrapper/generator, protected-diff-plan PASS
handoff PR merged, post-merge-check PASS, repo-status clean, fresh context available
